prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style darkness attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact eclipse-like darkness style: near-black violet mass, amethyst rim light, thin shard accents, and smoky residue that remains readable in battle. Make the subject a compact hit bloom at the moment of contact, with a dense dark center, a violet edge pulse, and a few sharp shard fragments radiating outward. Keep it readable at small size and battle-ready. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no decorative magical symbols, no oversized fog bank, no neon overload
notes: Primary contact bloom with the strongest silhouette.
